tool.name: RNAdistance
tool.description: Calculate distances between secondary structures of RNAs
tool.command: RNAdistance < '$input' > '$outfile' --distance=#echo ''.join(str($distance).split(','))# --compare=$compare $shapiro $backtrack #if $backtrack and str($compare) == "m" && cat backtrack.file >> '$outfile' #end if

validator.message: Please select at least one type.

param.name: compare
param.label: Comparison option
param.option: m: matrix (each with each, output in matrix form)

param.label: Use cost matrix by Bruce Shapiro

tool.help:
**RNAdistance**
Calculates distances between RNA secondary structures using various tree or string representations.
-----
**Input format**
RNAdistance requires one input file. Each entry consists of:
- Optional comment line starting with '>' - RNA sequence - One or more secondary structures in dot-bracket notation
-----
**Outputs**
- Distance between the structures - With `--backtrack`: alignment output appended
